personal.preferred_title: Data Analyst / Data Engineer - SQL, Python, AWS, Reporting

summary: Senior enterprise data and software engineer with 20+ years of experience supporting reporting, data analysis, production workflows, and stakeholder-facing analytics in regulated environments. Strong hands-on background with SQL, Python, data validation, ETL/ELT processes, workflow monitoring, documentation, and operational reporting. Experienced translating business needs into reliable data outputs, troubleshooting reporting issues, and improving repeatable delivery processes for internal stakeholders.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built and supported Python/Pandas data pipelines that transformed operational telemetry into validated reporting datasets for leadership, analytics, and infrastructure stakeholders.
Used SQL and Oracle data structures to query, reconcile, and validate large historical datasets, improving consistency and trust in recurring reporting outputs.
Monitored workflow health across data ingestion, transformation, and reporting processes; investigated exceptions, identified root causes, and supported timely issue resolution.
Developed stakeholder-facing dashboards and reports using Python visualization tooling and structured reporting layers, helping teams identify trends, anomalies, and improvement opportunities.
Documented data logic, operational procedures, and repeatable reporting processes so support teams could maintain delivery quality and reduce manual ambiguity.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Analyzed real-user and synthetic monitoring data to identify performance trends, reporting gaps, and optimization opportunities for customer-facing systems.
Produced operational analytics and recommendations from Dynatrace and Gomez data, translating technical findings into clear guidance for engineering stakeholders.
Supported reporting and monitoring workflows during platform upgrades, validating that data outputs and operational visibility remained stable through change.

experience.title: SME for CA APM / Senior Consultant
bullets: Created automated Perl/Korn shell reporting extracts and operational summaries from enterprise monitoring platforms, replacing manual weekly data pulls.
Partnered with technical and non-technical stakeholders to define reporting needs, validate outputs, and communicate production health and performance insights.
Maintained technical documentation, dashboards, alerting logic, and reusable support procedures across a large regulated enterprise environment.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Supported large-scale database migration and validation work using SQL, Oracle, MySQL, and C++/OCCI, emphasizing data accuracy and repeatable cutover checks.
Built automated validation and testing routines to verify migration correctness across high-volume transactional datasets.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built a Python-based workflow that scores job postings, tracks application state, validates generated artifacts, and produces repeatable reporting-ready outputs. The project emphasizes structured JSON, data validation, automation, and operational workflow discipline.

projects.name: HorizonScale Capacity Forecasting & Reporting
projects.description: Developed data pipelines and dashboards that transformed infrastructure telemetry into forecasting, utilization, and reporting views for operational stakeholders.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform - AWS
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, and Redshift concepts to organize, validate, and query curated analytics datasets.
